name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve

labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `vibe ...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 22.x or 24.x — run `node -v`]
- pnpm version: [e.g., 9.15.x — run `pnpm -v`]
- FFmpeg version: [e.g., 7.x — run `ffmpeg -version`]
- VibeFrame version: [run `vibe --version`]
- Install method: [install script, npm/npx, local checkout]

## Diagnostics

```bash
vibe doctor
vibe schema --list
```

## CLI Output

```
Paste the full command and output here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
